basic_details.job_title: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Interns, Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya (GGV) Project Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website of Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the GGV Project Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Embedded Systems Engineer: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./MTech. in Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 5 years of experience in embedded systems, startups, academic or industry projects. Hardware Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 2 years of experience in Hardware design, startups, academic or industry projects. Control Systems & Circuit Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 2 years of experience in Control Systems, Circuit Design, startups, academic or industry projects. Interns / Research Assistants: BTech/BCA/BBA with 55%. Freshers. Project Manager: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./MTech. in any related (Engineering) discipline with 55%. Minimum 10 years of experience in Automotive Industry or Industry projects.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Embedded Systems Engineer: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./MTech. in Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 5 years of experience in embedded systems, startups, academic or industry projects. Hardware Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 2 years of experience in Hardware design, startups, academic or industry projects. Control Systems & Circuit Design Engineer: B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering or related discipline with 55%. Minimum 2 years of experience in Control Systems, Circuit Design, startups, academic or industry projects. Interns / Research Assistants: BTech/BCA/BBA with 55%. Freshers. Project Manager: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./MTech. in any related (Engineering) discipline with 55%. Minimum 10 years of experience in Automotive Industry or Industry projects.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Project Staff positions announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted via email for this recruitment drive. Candidates need to send their complete application and documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Staff positions is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Which educational qualifications are required for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The required qualifications range from B.E./B.Tech./M.E./MTech. in various engineering disciplines to BTech/BCA/BBA, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The Project Manager position offers a salary of 70000/- PM.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Embedded Systems Engineer role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience in embedded systems, startups, academic, or industry projects is required for the Embedded Systems Engineer role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article.
